# invoices

Finance invoice record. Each row represents a billing cycle invoice sent to a customer.

## Gotchas

- `PaidAt IS NULL` means the invoice is still outstanding.
- Partial payments are tracked in `invoice_payments`; `AmountCents` here is the face value.
